title: Legacy Remnant
description: A legacy console experience corrupted by The Broken Script.
body:
![Legacy Remnant modpack logo. Legacy remnant text yellow, with minor jittering and old Minecraft logo pure white, with complete jitter and glitching on 'raft' section of "Minecraft" section of text.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d49779c5cad654edf0a77783dcb043625322a2.png)
_A legacy console version of The Broken Script._

# ⛓️‍💥 A "Broken" Modpack ⛓️‍💥

Not really, though. Packed with all your favourite optimization mods, like Sodium, with more (or less) performance mods coming in the future, this is a lightweight modpack featuring **[The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)**, **[Legacy 4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)**, and **[Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta)**, all to create a blazing fast and seamless _legacy console_ experience to go with The Broken Script. 
⚡⚡⚡

# 🌍 Old World-Gen 🌍

Thanks to **Moderner Beta**, you can select whatever type of world-generation you'd like from your world type, whether it be pre-1.17 or from beta versions! The choice is up to you.

![A showcase of some of Moderner Beta's world presets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/326af132477f76d64d9ee7df1e3ba536ec2fa4d8.png)

# 🎮 All Controllers Compatible 🎮

Whatever controller you have, Playstation or Xbox, or anything inbetween, is compatible thanks to **Legacy4J**! Just connect it, and you're ready to go.

# ⚠️ ALL RIGHTS RESERVED ⚠️

All rights to the included mods, textures, and code are reserved by the respective creators. This modpack does not claim any ownership of any third-party content, and is not to be distributed without explicit permission.

# 🏃‍♀️Looking for lightweight without horror?
Check out **[Windows Edition](https://modrinth.com/modpack/windows-edition)**! It's lightweight, optimized, and has a perfect blend of Java and Legacy Console edition.
